---
output-file: index
lang: en
title: "An Introduction to Generative AI for RSEs"
subtitle: "How we got here: principles and tooling — ICCS Summer School 2026"
from: markdown+emoji
format:
  revealjs:
    embed-resources: false
    chalkboard: false
    preview-links: auto
    history: false
    highlight-style: a11y
    code-overflow: wrap
    code-line-numbers: true
    logo: images/combined_logo.png
    theme: [default, custom.scss]
    preview: true
    slide-number: true
    # mermaid-format: png
    mermaid:
      theme: forest
revealjs-plugins:
  - attribution
  - pointer
  - pointer-sync
author:
  - name: "Cordero Core"
    orcid: 0000-0002-3531-3221
  - name: "Tom Meltzer"
    orcid: 0000-0003-1740-9550
  - name: "Matt Archer"
    orcid: 0009-0002-7043-6769
bibliography: references.bib
include-in-header:
  - text: |
      <style>
      #title-slide .title {
        font-size: 1.25em;
        color: #fffff;
      }
      #title-slide .authors {
        font-size: 1.0em;
        color: #fffff;
      }
      </style>
---

{{< include _intro.qmd >}}

{{< include _intro_transformers.qmd >}}

{{< include _intro_agents.qmd >}}

{{< include _intro_reading.qmd >}}

{{< include _concerns.qmd >}}

{{< include _tools.qmd >}}

## References {.smaller}
